title: WTF Is the Context Layer? The Missing Infrastructure for Production Agents — Prukalpa Sankar
reasoning: This video targets key tech stack architectures that a junior fullstack developer needs to understand to build modern, production-grade AI agents.
summary: As a junior developer, staying ahead of the AI curve is crucial for your career. This talk breaks down the 'context layer'—the critical, often missing infrastructure needed to build reliable AI agents—giving you the architectural insights to build smarter, production-ready applications.

title: Don't Ship Skills Without Evals — Philipp Schmid, Google DeepMind
reasoning: Teaches essential software engineering discipline and best practices from a Google DeepMind expert, directly helping a junior dev improve their code quality.
summary: Step up your engineering game by learning how the best in the industry deploy software. A Google DeepMind engineer explains why rigorous evaluation frameworks are non-negotiable, helping you build more reliable applications and cultivate a high-standard engineering mindset early in your career.

title: Forward Deployed Engineering at Cursor — Pauline Brunet
reasoning: Provides brilliant career-pathway exploration for early-career developers by showcasing high-impact engineering roles at top-tier startups.
summary: Discover how the team behind Cursor—the AI-powered code editor taking the developer world by storm—approaches forward-deployed engineering. This is a must-watch for any junior dev looking to understand unique career paths that bridge the gap between hard engineering and customer problem-solving.

title: Why every chemo ward needs an artroom | Prachi Kulkarni | TEDxCCOEW
reasoning: While heartwarming, this healthcare-focused talk has zero relevance to software engineering, career growth in tech, or Islamic financial advocacy.

title: A hostage negotiator's guide to being conflict-ready | Ryan Dunlap | TEDxPortland
reasoning: Invaluable soft-skills and career advice for an early-career professional navigating workplace dynamics, code reviews, and project alignments.
summary: Technical skills get you the job, but communication skills get you promoted. Learn how to handle workplace conflicts, tough code reviews, and high-stakes salary negotiations using battle-tested tactics from a former hostage negotiator.

title: AI is shaping war—what about peace? | Branka Panic | TEDxCalle Aldama
reasoning: Provides a brilliant ethical framework on AI that aligns strongly with Islamic principles of peace, ethics, and social responsibility in tech.
summary: As a Muslim and a tech professional, ethical alignment in your work is vital. This compelling talk challenges you to think beyond just writing code and explore how AI can be intentionally designed to foster global peace and social harmony.
